接口 IWebSocketTemplate

所有已知实现类:
JAXRSDocBuildTemplate, SolonDocBuildTemplate, SpringBootDocBuildTemplate
public interface IWebSocketTemplate
the WebSocket Template
从以下版本开始:
3.0.3

    修饰符和类型
    字段
    说明

    param order AtomicInteger
    static final Logger

    修饰符和类型
    方法
    说明
    default WebSocketDoc
    buildEntryPointWebSocketDoc(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass javaClass, ProjectDocConfigBuilder projectBuilder, IWebSocketRequestHandler webSocketRequestHandler, int order, com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaAnnotation serverEndpointAnnotation)
    build websocket doc
    static Set<String>
    extractPathParams(String url)
    Extracts the path parameters from a URL.
    default Optional<com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaAnnotation>

    Get WebSocket annotations from a JavaClass based on FrameworkAnnotations.
    default void
    populateWebSocketParams(ProjectDocConfigBuilder projectBuilder, WebSocketDoc webSocketDoc, com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass javaClass, ServerEndpoint serverEndpoint)
    Populates the WebSocketDoc object with both path and message parameters from the provided JavaClass and ServerEndpoint.
    default List<WebSocketDoc>
    processWebSocketData(ProjectDocConfigBuilder projectBuilder, FrameworkAnnotations frameworkAnnotations, IWebSocketRequestHandler webSocketRequestHandler, Collection<com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass> candidateClasses)
    Processes the provided Java classes and generates WebSocket documentation.
    static String
    replaceHttpPrefixToWebSocketPrefix(String url)
    Replaces the HTTP prefix with a WebSocket prefix in a given URL.
    default void
    setResponseParam(ProjectDocConfigBuilder projectBuilder, WebSocketDoc webSocketDoc, ServerEndpoint serverEndpoint)
    Sets the response parameters for the WebSocketDoc object based on the provided ServerEndpoint.

  • 字段详细资料

    • ATOMIC_INTEGER

      static final AtomicInteger ATOMIC_INTEGER
      param order AtomicInteger

    • log

      static final Logger log
      logger

  • 方法详细资料

    • processWebSocketData

      default List<WebSocketDoc> processWebSocketData(ProjectDocConfigBuilder projectBuilder, FrameworkAnnotations frameworkAnnotations, IWebSocketRequestHandler webSocketRequestHandler, Collection<com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass> candidateClasses)
      Processes the provided Java classes and generates WebSocket documentation.
      参数:
      projectBuilder - The project configuration builder.
      frameworkAnnotations - The framework annotations to look for.
      webSocketRequestHandler - The handler for processing WebSocket requests.
      candidateClasses - The collection of Java classes to process.
      返回:
      A list of WebSocketDoc containing the documentation for the WebSocket endpoints.

    • buildEntryPointWebSocketDoc

      default WebSocketDoc buildEntryPointWebSocketDoc(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass javaClass, ProjectDocConfigBuilder projectBuilder, IWebSocketRequestHandler webSocketRequestHandler, int order, com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaAnnotation serverEndpointAnnotation)
      build websocket doc
      参数:
      javaClass - JavaClass
      projectBuilder - ProjectDocConfigBuilder
      webSocketRequestHandler - WebSocketRequestHandler
      order - order
      serverEndpointAnnotation - ServerEndpointAnnotation
      返回:
      WebSocketDoc

    • getOptionalWebSocketAnnotation

      default Optional<com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaAnnotation> getOptionalWebSocketAnnotation(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass javaClass, FrameworkAnnotations frameworkAnnotations)
      Get WebSocket annotations from a JavaClass based on FrameworkAnnotations.
      参数:
      javaClass - The JavaClass to retrieve annotations from.
      frameworkAnnotations - The FrameworkAnnotations containing specific framework annotation information.
      返回:
      An Optional JavaAnnotation containing the WebSocket annotation, or Optional.empty() if not found.

    • populateWebSocketParams

      default void populateWebSocketParams(ProjectDocConfigBuilder projectBuilder, WebSocketDoc webSocketDoc, com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass javaClass, ServerEndpoint serverEndpoint)
      Populates the WebSocketDoc object with both path and message parameters from the provided JavaClass and ServerEndpoint.
      参数:
      projectBuilder - The project configuration builder.
      webSocketDoc - The WebSocketDoc object to be populated with parameters.
      javaClass - The JavaClass containing the WebSocket endpoint.
      serverEndpoint - The ServerEndpoint containing the URL and parameters.

    • setResponseParam

      default void setResponseParam(ProjectDocConfigBuilder projectBuilder, WebSocketDoc webSocketDoc, ServerEndpoint serverEndpoint)
      Sets the response parameters for the WebSocketDoc object based on the provided ServerEndpoint.
      参数:
      projectBuilder - The project configuration builder.
      webSocketDoc - The WebSocketDoc object to be populated with response parameters.
      serverEndpoint - The ServerEndpoint containing the URL and parameters.

    • replaceHttpPrefixToWebSocketPrefix

      static String replaceHttpPrefixToWebSocketPrefix(String url)
      Replaces the HTTP prefix with a WebSocket prefix in a given URL.
      参数:
      url - The URL to modify.
      返回:
      The modified URL with a WebSocket prefix.

    • extractPathParams

      static Set<String> extractPathParams(String url)
      Extracts the path parameters from a URL.
      参数:
      url - The URL containing path parameters.
      返回:
      A set of extracted path parameter names.
